# STEADYWRK

> STEADYWRK (steadywrk.app) is an AI-native career platform based in Amman, Jordan. We connect ambitious Jordanian talent with US commercial operations across four verticals: facility management, digital marketing, AI development, and business process operations. We train, deploy, and develop operators who serve US clients. Not a job board. Not a staffing agency. A structured, AI-powered career infrastructure.

## What STEADYWRK Does

STEADYWRK operates four verticals powered by AI-native infrastructure:

1. AI Lab & Studio — Custom AI agent development, LLM integration, MCP server architecture, autonomous workflow design
2. Facility Management — End-to-end field service operations, dispatch coordination, subcontractor management for US commercial properties
3. Digital Marketing — Data-driven campaigns, SEO, content strategy, brand development using AI tooling
4. AI BPO — AI-enhanced business process outsourcing: customer support, document processing, back-office automation

Our hiring pipeline: Apply → AI-powered assessment → Structured training (IGNITE/ORBIT/APEX programs) → Deploy to US client operations.

Tagline: "Where ambition compounds."
Core promise: "If you are disciplined, bright, and hungry, this is where your curve bends upward."

## Who STEADYWRK Serves

Talent side: Jordanian CS, AI, data science, and engineering graduates (22–30). Jordan has 7,000+ ICT graduates per year, 41.72% youth unemployment, and massive untapped potential. We focus on candidates who are disciplined, bright, and hungry.

Client side: US companies needing commercial operations support — facility management, digital marketing, AI development, BPO services — delivered by pre-vetted, AI-trained Jordanian operators.

## Open Roles

- Operations Dispatcher (Amman, 400–700 JOD) — Coordinate field service operations for US commercial properties
- AI Engineer (Amman/Remote, 800–1,500 JOD) — Build AI agent systems, LLM integrations, autonomous workflows
- Frontend Developer (Amman/Remote, 700–1,200 JOD) — Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind v4
- Digital Marketing Lead (Amman, 600–1,000 JOD) — SEO, SEM, content strategy, analytics
- AI BPO Agent (Amman, 350–500 JOD) — AI-enhanced customer interactions, training provided

Apply: https://steadywrk.app/careers

## Programs

- IGNITE (Internship, 3 months) — Ship production work from week one. Real AI projects, real deadlines.
- ORBIT (Fellowship, 6 months) — Lead projects, mentor juniors, build systems across verticals.
- APEX (Leadership, 12 months) — Architect solutions, drive teams, shape technical direction.

## Location and Context

- Headquarters: Building 15, King Hussein Business Park, Amman, Jordan
- Entity: STEADYWRK LLC (US/JO)
- Founded: 2025
- Tech stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind v4, Supabase, Railway, Clerk Auth, Drizzle ORM, PostHog, Resend, Cal.com, Cloudflare Workers
- Ecosystem: Jordan AI/ICT sector valued at $3.1B (2026), growing at ~16% CAGR toward $6.5B by 2031

## Key Data Points

- Jordan youth unemployment (15–24): 41.72% (World Bank)
- Jordan female youth unemployment: ~66%
- Jordan female labor force participation: ~14% (4th lowest globally)
- Jordan ICT market: $3.1B (2026) → $6.5B by 2031
- Jordan ICT graduates per year: ~7,000
- Jordan internet penetration: 95.6%
- STEADYWRK average time to hire: 14 days
- STEADYWRK acceptance rate: <5%
